21: import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
22: import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
23: 
24: import java.time.Instant;
25: import java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit;
26: import java.util.Optional;
27: 
28: @Service
29: @RequiredArgsConstructor
30: @Slf4j
31: public class AuthService {
32: 
33:     private final UserRepository userRepository;
34:     private final PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder;
35:     private final PasswordPolicyService passwordPolicyService;
36:     private final SessionService sessionService;
37:     private final AuditService auditService;
38:     private final AppProperties appProperties;
39: 
40:     public static final String LOGIN_FAILURE = "Invalid username or password";
41: 
42:     @Transactional
43:     public LoginResult login(LoginRequest request, HttpServletRequest httpRequest, boolean captchaPassed) {
44:         log.info("Login attempt for user={}", request.username());
45:         Optional<User> userOptional = userRepository.findByUsername(request.username());
46:         if (userOptional.isEmpty()) {
47:             passwordEncoder.matches(request.password(), "$2a$10$dummyhashtopreventtimingleak000000000000000000000");
48:             return LoginResult.failure(false, -1);
49:         }
50:         User user = userOptional.get();
51:         validateLockState(user);
52:         boolean captchaRequired = user.getFailedLoginAttempts() >= appProperties.getSecurity().getCaptchaAfterFailures();
53:         if (captchaRequired && !captchaPassed) {
54:             return LoginResult.failure(true, -1);
55:         }
56:         if (!passwordEncoder.matches(request.password(), user.getPasswordHash())) {
57:             auditService.log(user.getId(), "USER_LOGIN_FAILED", "USER", user.getId(), null, null);
58:             registerFailure(user);
59:             boolean requireCaptcha = user.getFailedLoginAttempts() >= appProperties.getSecurity().getCaptchaAfterFailures();
60:             return LoginResult.failure(requireCaptcha, -1);
61:         }
62:         resetFailures(user);
63:         auditService.log(user.getId(), "USER_LOGIN", "USER", user.getId(), null, null);
64:         boolean passwordExpired = user.getPasswordChangedAt() != null && user.getPasswordChangedAt()
65:             .isBefore(Instant.now().minus(appProperties.getSecurity().getPassword().getRotationDays(), ChronoUnit.DAYS));
66:         UserSession session = sessionService.createSession(user, httpRequest.getRemoteAddr(), httpRequest.getHeader("User-Agent"));
67:         return LoginResult.success(new LoginResponse(UserResponse.from(user), session.getCsrfToken(), passwordExpired), session.getId());
68:     }
69: 
70:     private void validateLockState(User user) {
71:         if (user.getStatus() == UserStatus.DISABLED) {
72:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN, "Account disabled");
73:         }
74:         if (user.getStatus() == UserStatus.LOCKED) {
75:             if (user.getLockedUntil() != null && user.getLockedUntil().isAfter(Instant.now())) {
76:                 throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.LOCKED, "Account locked until " + user.getLockedUntil());
77:             }
78:             user.setStatus(UserStatus.ACTIVE);
79:             user.setLockedUntil(null);
80:             user.setFailedLoginAttempts(0);
81:             userRepository.save(user);
82:         }
83:     }
84: 
85:     private int registerFailure(User user) {
86:         int attempts = user.getFailedLoginAttempts() + 1;
87:         user.setFailedLoginAttempts(attempts);
88:         boolean captchaToggle = attempts >= appProperties.getSecurity().getCaptchaAfterFailures();
89:         user.setCaptchaRequired(captchaToggle);
90:         if (attempts >= appProperties.getSecurity().getLockAfterFailures()) {
91:             user.setStatus(UserStatus.LOCKED);
92:             user.setLockedUntil(Instant.now().plus(appProperties.getSecurity().getLockDurationMinutes(), ChronoUnit.MINUTES));
93:         }
94:         userRepository.save(user);
95:         return appProperties.getSecurity().getLockAfterFailures() - attempts;
96:     }
97: 
98:     private void resetFailures(User user) {
99:         user.setFailedLoginAttempts(0);
100:         user.setCaptchaRequired(false);
101:         user.setStatus(UserStatus.ACTIVE);
102:         user.setLockedUntil(null);
103:         userRepository.save(user);
104:     }
105: 
106:     @Transactional
107:     public UserResponse register(RegisterRequest request) {
108:         log.info("Registration attempt for user={}", request.username());
109:         if (userRepository.findByUsername(request.username()).isPresent()) {
110:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.CONFLICT, "Username already taken");
111:         }
112:         if (userRepository.findByEmail(request.email()).isPresent()) {
113:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.CONFLICT, "Email already registered");
114:         }
115:         var violations = passwordPolicyService.validate(request.password());
116:         if (!violations.isEmpty()) {
117:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, String.join("; ", violations));
118:         }
119:         User user = new User();
120:         user.setUsername(request.username());
121:         user.setEmail(request.email());
122:         user.setRole(UserRole.EMPLOYER);
123:         user.setStatus(UserStatus.ACTIVE);
124:         user.setPasswordHash(passwordEncoder.encode(request.password()));
125:         user.setPasswordChangedAt(Instant.now());
126:         user.setCreatedAt(Instant.now());
127:         user.setUpdatedAt(Instant.now());
128:         user.setCaptchaRequired(false);
129:         User saved = userRepository.save(user);
130:         auditService.log(saved.getId(), "USER_CREATED", "USER", saved.getId(), null, saved);
131:         return UserResponse.from(saved);
132:     }
133: 
134:     @Transactional
135:     public void logout(Long userId) {
136:         auditService.log(userId, "USER_LOGOUT", "USER", userId, null, null);
137:         sessionService.invalidateAllSessions(userId);
138:     }
139: 
140:     @Transactional
141:     public void changePassword(Long userId, ChangePasswordRequest request) {
142:         User user = userRepository.findById(userId)
143:             .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND, "User not found"));
144:         log.info("Password change for userId={}", user.id());
145:         if (!passwordEncoder.matches(request.currentPassword(), user.getPasswordHash())) {
146:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "Current password is incorrect");
147:         }
148:         var violations = passwordPolicyService.validate(request.newPassword());
149:         if (!violations.isEmpty()) {
150:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, String.join("; ", violations));
151:         }
152:         user.setPasswordHash(passwordEncoder.encode(request.newPassword()));
153:         user.setPasswordChangedAt(Instant.now());
154:         userRepository.save(user);
155:         auditService.log(userId, "PASSWORD_CHANGED", "USER", userId, null, null);
156:         sessionService.invalidateAllSessions(userId);
157:     }
158: 
159:     @Transactional(readOnly = true)
160:     public UserResponse me(Long userId) {
161:         User user = userRepository.findById(userId)
162:             .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND, "User not found"));
163:         return UserResponse.from(user);
164:     }
165: 
166:     public record LoginResult(LoginResponse response, LoginFailure failure, String sessionToken) {
167:         public static LoginResult success(LoginResponse response, String sessionToken) {
168:             return new LoginResult(response, null, sessionToken);
169:         }
170: 
171:         public static LoginResult failure(boolean captchaRequired, int remainingAttempts) {
172:             return new LoginResult(null, new LoginFailure(captchaRequired, remainingAttempts), null);
173:         }
174: 
175:         public boolean isSuccess() {
176:             return response != null;
177:         }
178:     }
179: 
180:     public record LoginFailure(boolean captchaRequired, int remainingAttempts) {
181:     }
182: }

# Fix: Move AES Key from docker-compose.yml to .env File

## Priority: LOW â€” Default secret key in version control

## Files to modify
- `docker-compose.yml`

## Files to create
- `.env.example`

## Step 1 â€” Update docker-compose.yml to reference .env

Open `docker-compose.yml`.

Find the `backend` service `environment` section (around line 28-34). Change the `AES_SECRET_KEY` line:

From:
```yaml
      AES_SECRET_KEY: ThisIsA32ByteKeyForAES256Enc!!
```

To:
```yaml
      AES_SECRET_KEY: ${AES_SECRET_KEY}
```

Also move the database credentials to env vars. Change:
```yaml
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ShiftW0rks2026
```

To:
```yaml
      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-ShiftW0rks2026}
```

## Step 2 â€” Create .env.example

Create a file called `.env.example` at the project root with this content:

```
# Copy this file to .env before running docker compose
# .env is already in .gitignore

AES_SECRET_KEY=ThisIsA32ByteKeyForAES256Enc!!
DB_PASSWORD=ShiftW0rks2026
```

## Step 3 â€” Create .env for local dev

Create a file called `.env` at the project root with the same content:

```
AES_SECRET_KEY=ThisIsA32ByteKeyForAES256Enc!!
DB_PASSWORD=ShiftW0rks2026
```

Docker Compose automatically reads `.env` from the project root. Since `.env` is already in `.gitignore`, it won't be committed.

## Verification

1. `grep "AES_SECRET_KEY" docker-compose.yml` â€” should show `${AES_SECRET_KEY}`, NOT the actual key value
2. `cat .env.example` â€” should show the template
3. `.env` should exist but NOT be tracked by git (`git status` should not list it)

**Preparing .env files and Docker Compose**

content.text:
- Docker Compose now references secrets via environment variables (`AES_SECRET_KEY`, `DB_PASSWORD`) so the values can be provided through `.env` or the shell, eliminating hardcoded keys (`docker-compose.yml`).
- Added `.env.example` and a local `.env` template so developers can supply the AES key/database password outside of version control.

Checks:
- `grep "AES_SECRET_KEY" docker-compose.yml` â†’ uses `${AES_SECRET_KEY}`
- `.env.example` documents both vars, `.env` exists locally but remains untracked (confirmed via `git status`)

# Fix: Add SQL Security Comment + Rename Validity Config Field

## Priority: LOW â€” Code clarity and naming accuracy

## Files to modify
- `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/DashboardService.java`
- `backend/src/main/resources/application.yml`
- `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/config/AppProperties.java`
- `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/JobPostingService.java`
- `backend/src/test/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/JobPostingServiceTest.java`

## Step 1 â€” Add security contract comment to DashboardService.queryMetric

Open `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/DashboardService.java`.

Find the `queryMetric` method (around line 188). Add a Javadoc comment immediately before it:

```java
    /**
     * SECURITY CONTRACT: This method builds native SQL via StringBuilder. All user-controlled
     * inputs (metric, dimension, statuses) are validated through exhaustive switch/enum checks
     * before reaching the SQL string. Date parameters use named bind variables (:from, :to).
     * If adding new metrics or dimensions, they MUST go through the same whitelist pattern â€”
     * never interpolate user input directly into the SQL string.
     */
    private List<Map<String, Object>> queryMetric(String metric, String dimension, Map<String, Object> filters) {
```

## Step 2 â€” Rename validity-days.min to validity-days.default-days in application.yml

Open `backend/src/main/resources/application.yml`.

Find:
```yaml
    validity-days:
      min: 30
      max: 90
```

Replace with:
```yaml
    validity-days:
      default-days: 30
      max: 90
```

## Step 3 â€” Update AppProperties.java

Open `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/config/AppProperties.java`.

Find the `Range` class or the `ValidityDays` inner class that holds `min` and `max` for validity-days. If there's a shared `Range` class used for validity-days, you need a separate inner class.

If validity-days uses a `Range` class with `min`/`max` fields, create a dedicated inner class:

```java
    @Data
    public static class ValidityDays {
        private int defaultDays = 30;
        private int max = 90;
    }
```

Update the `JobValidation` class to use `ValidityDays` instead of `Range` for `validityDays`.

## Step 4 â€” Update JobPostingService.java

Open `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/JobPostingService.java`.

Find the line that reads `getValidityDays().getMin()` (around line 260):

```java
        LocalDate defaultEnd = startDate.plusDays(appProperties.getJobValidation().getValidityDays().getMin());
```

Replace with:

```java
        LocalDate defaultEnd = startDate.plusDays(appProperties.getJobValidation().getValidityDays().getDefaultDays());
```

## Step 5 â€” Update JobPostingServiceTest.java

Open `backend/src/test/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/JobPostingServiceTest.java`.

Find where `validityDays` is configured in the `buildProps()` method. Update it to use the new field name:

Replace:
```java
        validity.setMin(30);
        validity.setMax(90);
```

With:
```java
        validity.setDefaultDays(30);
        validity.setMax(90);
```

Note: If validity-days uses the generic `Range` class, you'll need to change the type in `AppProperties.JobValidation` from `Range` to the new `ValidityDays` class and update the `buildProps()` in the test accordingly.

159:     List<Map<String, Object>> execute(DashboardConfig config) {
160:         return executeQuery(config);

163:     List<Map<String, Object>> maskRows(List<Map<String, Object>> rows) {

167:     private List<Map<String, Object>> executeQuery(DashboardConfig config) {
168:         List<String> metrics = objectMapper.convertValue(config.getMetricsJson(), new TypeReference<>() {});
169:         String dimension = objectMapper.convertValue(config.getDimensionsJson(), String.class);
170:         Map<String, Object> filters = config.getFiltersJson() != null ? objectMapper.convertValue(config.getFiltersJson(), Map.class) : Map.of();
171: 
172:         Map<String, Map<String, Object>> rows = new LinkedHashMap<>();
173:         for (String metric : metrics) {
174:             List<Map<String, Object>> results = queryMetric(metric, dimension, filters);
175:             for (Map<String, Object> row : results) {
176:                 String key = row.get("dimension").toString();
177:                 Map<String, Object> entry = rows.computeIfAbsent(key, k -> {
178:                     Map<String, Object> map = new LinkedHashMap<>();
179:                     map.put("dimension", k);
180:                     return map;
181:                 });
182:                 entry.put(metric, row.get("value"));
183:             }
184:         }
185:         return new ArrayList<>(rows.values());
186:     }
187: 
188:     private List<Map<String, Object>> queryMetric(String metric, String dimension, Map<String, Object> filters) {
189:         String table;
190:         String condition = "";
191:         String join = "";
192:         switch (metric) {
193:             case "post_volume":
194:                 table = "job_postings";
195:                 break;
196:             case "claim_count":
197:                 table = "claims";
198:                 break;
199:             case "review_count":
200:             case "approval_rate":
201:             case "handling_time":
202:             case "takedown_count":
203:                 table = "review_actions";
204:                 break;
205:             default:
206:                 throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "metric: Unsupported");
207:         }
208:         Instant from = filters.containsKey("dateFrom") ? Instant.parse(filters.get("dateFrom").toString()) : Instant.now().minusSeconds(30 * 86400);
209:         Instant to = filters.containsKey("dateTo") ? Instant.parse(filters.get("dateTo").toString()) : Instant.now();
210:         List<String> statuses = filters.containsKey("statuses") ? (List<String>) filters.get("statuses") : List.of();
211: 
212:         String baseAlias = table.equals("review_actions") ? "ra" : table.equals("claims") ? "c" : "jp";
213:         String dimensionExpr = resolveDimension(dimension, baseAlias);
214: 
215:         String metricExpr = switch (metric) {
216:             case "post_volume", "claim_count", "review_count" -> "COUNT(*)";
217:             case "approval_rate" -> "ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ra.action = 'APPROVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 4)";
218:             case "handling_time" -> "AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, jp.created_at, ra.created_at))";
219:             case "takedown_count" -> "SUM(CASE WHEN ra.action = 'TAKEDOWN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)";
220:             default -> "COUNT(*)";
221:         };
222: 
223:         StringBuilder sql = new StringBuilder("SELECT " + dimensionExpr + " AS dimension, " + metricExpr + " AS value FROM " + table + " " + baseAlias + " ");
224:         if (!table.equals("job_postings")) {
225:             String joinCondition = table.equals("review_actions") ? "ra.job_posting_id = jp.id" : "c.job_posting_id = jp.id";
226:             sql.append("JOIN job_postings jp ON ").append(joinCondition).append(" ");
227:         }
228:         if (dimension.equals("category")) {
229:             sql.append("JOIN categories cat ON cat.id = jp.category_id ");
230:         }
231:         if (dimension.equals("location_state")) {
232:             sql.append("JOIN locations loc ON loc.id = jp.location_id ");
233:         }
234:         if (dimension.equals("reviewer") && table.equals("review_actions")) {
235:             sql.append("JOIN users usr ON usr.id = ra.reviewer_id ");
236:         }
237:         sql.append("WHERE ").append(baseAlias).append(".created_at >= :from AND ").append(baseAlias).append(".created_at <= :to ");
238:         if (!statuses.isEmpty()) {
239:             List<String> safeStatuses = statuses.stream()
240:                 .filter(s -> {
241:                     try {
242:                         com.shiftworks.jobops.enums.JobStatus.valueOf(s.toUpperCase(java.util.Locale.ROOT));
243:                         return true;
244:                     } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
245:                         return false;
246:                     }
247:                 })
248:                 .map(s -> s.toUpperCase(java.util.Locale.ROOT))
249:                 .toList();
250:             if (!safeStatuses.isEmpty()) {
251:                 String statusList = safeStatuses.stream().map(s -> "'" + s + "'").reduce((a, b) -> a + "," + b).orElse("");
252:                 sql.append("AND jp.status IN (").append(statusList).append(") ");
253:             }
254:         }
255:         sql.append("GROUP BY dimension ORDER BY dimension");
256: 
257:         Query query = entityManager.createNativeQuery(sql);
258:         query.setParameter("from", from);
259:         query.setParameter("to", to);
260:         List<Object[]> raw = query.getResultList();
261:         List<Map<String, Object>> rows = new ArrayList<>();
262:         for (Object[] row : raw) {
263:             Map<String, Object> map = new HashMap<>();
264:             map.put("dimension", row[0]);
265:             map.put("value", row[1]);
266:             rows.add(map);
267:         }
268:         return rows;
269:     }
270: 
271:     private String resolveDimension(String dimension, String alias) {
272:         return switch (dimension) {
273:             case "date_daily" -> "DATE(" + alias + ".created_at)";
274:             case "date_weekly" -> "DATE_FORMAT(" + alias + ".created_at, '%x-%v')";
275:             case "date_monthly" -> "DATE_FORMAT(" + alias + ".created_at, '%Y-%m')";
276:             case "status" -> "jp.status";
277:             case "category" -> "cat.name";
278:             case "location_state" -> "loc.state";
279:             case "reviewer" -> "usr.username";
280:             default -> "DATE(" + alias + ".created_at)";
281:         };
282:     }
283: 
284:     byte[] toCsv(List<Map<String, Object>> rows) {
285:         try (ByteArrayOutputStream bos = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
286:              OutputStreamWriter writer = new OutputStreamWriter(bos, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
287:              CSVPrinter printer = new CSVPrinter(writer, CSVFormat.DEFAULT.withHeader(rows.get(0).keySet().toArray(new String[0])))) {
288:             for (Map<String, Object> row : rows) {
289:                 printer.printRecord(row.values());
290:             }
291:             printer.flush();
292:             return bos.toByteArray();
293:         } catch (IOException e) {
294:             throw new RuntimeException(e);
295:         }
296:     }
297: 
298:     private DashboardConfigResponse toResponse(DashboardConfig config) {
299:         return new DashboardConfigResponse(config.getId(), config.getName(), config.getMetricsJson(), config.getDimensionsJson(), config.getFiltersJson());
300:     }
301: 
302:     private Map<String, Object> maskSensitiveFields(Map<String, Object> row) {
303:         Map<String, Object> copy = new HashMap<>(row);
304:         if (copy.containsKey("username")) {
305:             copy.put("username", maskLabel(copy.get("username")));
306:         }
307:         if (copy.containsKey("reviewer")) {
308:             copy.put("reviewer", maskLabel(copy.get("reviewer")));
309:         }
310:         Object dim = copy.get("dimension");
311:         if (dim != null && dim.toString().matches(".*[a-zA-Z].*") && !dim.toString().matches("\\d{4}-.+")) {
312:             copy.put("dimension", maskLabel(dim));
313:         }
314:         return copy;
315:     }
316: 
317:     private String maskLabel(Object value) {
318:         if (value == null) {
319:             return null;
320:         }
321:         String text = value.toString();
322:         if (text.length() <= 3) {
323:             return "***";
324:         }
325:         return text.substring(0, Math.min(3, text.length())) + "***";
326:     }
327: }

201: 
202:     private Specification<JobPosting> buildSpecification(AuthenticatedUser user, String statusValue, Long categoryId, Long locationId, String search) {
203:         return (root, query, cb) -> {
204:             query.distinct(true);
205:             List<Predicate> predicates = new ArrayList<>();
206:             if (user.role() == UserRole.EMPLOYER) {
207:                 predicates.add(cb.equal(root.get("employer").get("id"), user.id()));
208:             } else if (user.role() == UserRole.REVIEWER) {
209:                 predicates.add(root.get("status").in(List.of(JobStatus.PENDING_REVIEW, JobStatus.PUBLISHED)));
210:             }
211:             if (statusValue != null && !statusValue.isBlank()) {
212:                 JobStatus status = parseStatus(statusValue);
213:                 predicates.add(cb.equal(root.get("status"), status));
214:             }
215:             if (categoryId != null) {
216:                 predicates.add(cb.equal(root.get("category").get("id"), categoryId));
217:             }
218:             if (locationId != null) {
219:                 predicates.add(cb.equal(root.get("location").get("id"), locationId));
220:             }
221:             if (search != null && !search.isBlank()) {
222:                 String like = "%" + search.toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT) + "%";
223:                 predicates.add(cb.or(
224:                     cb.like(cb.lower(root.get("title")), like),
225:                     cb.like(cb.lower(root.get("description")), like)
226:                 ));
227:             }
228:             return cb.and(predicates.toArray(new Predicate[0]));
229:         };
230:     }
231: 
232:     private Sort buildSort(String sort, String direction) {
233:         String sortField = (sort == null || sort.isBlank()) ? "createdAt" : sort;
234:         if (!List.of("createdAt", "payAmount").contains(sortField)) {
235:             sortField = "createdAt";
236:         }
237:         Sort.Direction dir = "asc".equalsIgnoreCase(direction) ? Sort.Direction.ASC : Sort.Direction.DESC;
238:         return Sort.by(dir, sortField);
239:     }
240: 
241:     private void applyRequest(JobPosting jobPosting, JobPostingRequest request, boolean allowDefaultValidity) {
242:         validateBaseRequest(request);
243:         Category category = categoryRepository.findById(request.categoryId())
244:             .filter(Category::isActive)
245:             .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "categoryId: Category is inactive or missing"));
246:         Location location = locationRepository.findById(request.locationId())
247:             .filter(Location::isActive)
248:             .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "locationId: Location is inactive or missing"));
249:         jobPosting.setTitle(request.title().trim());
250:         jobPosting.setDescription(request.description().trim());
251:         jobPosting.setCategory(category);
252:         jobPosting.setLocation(location);
253:         jobPosting.setPayType(request.payType());
254:         jobPosting.setSettlementType(request.settlementType());
255:         jobPosting.setPayAmount(request.payAmount().setScale(2, RoundingMode.HALF_UP));
256:         jobPosting.setHeadcount(request.headcount());
257:         jobPosting.setWeeklyHours(request.weeklyHours().setScale(1, RoundingMode.HALF_UP));
258:         jobPosting.setContactPhone(request.contactPhone());
259:         LocalDate startDate = request.validityStart() != null ? request.validityStart() : LocalDate.now();
260:         LocalDate defaultEnd = startDate.plusDays(appProperties.getJobValidation().getValidityDays().getMin());
261:         LocalDate endDate = request.validityEnd() != null ? request.validityEnd() : defaultEnd;
262:         if (!allowDefaultValidity && request.validityEnd() == null) {
263:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "validityEnd: Validity end date is required");
264:         }
265:         validateDates(startDate, endDate, false);
266:         jobPosting.setValidityStart(startDate);
267:         jobPosting.setValidityEnd(endDate);
268:         applyTags(jobPosting, request.tags());
269:     }
270: 
271:     private void applyTags(JobPosting jobPosting, List<String> tags) {
272:         jobPosting.getTags().clear();
273:         if (tags == null) {
274:             return;
275:         }
276:         if (tags.size() > 10) {
277:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "tags: Maximum of 10 tags allowed");
278:         }
279:         tags.stream()
280:             .map(tag -> tag == null ? "" : tag.trim())
281:             .filter(tag -> !tag.isEmpty())
282:             .map(tag -> {
283:                 if (tag.length() > 30) {
284:                     throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "tags: Tag '" + tag + "' exceeds 30 characters");
285:                 }
286:                 return tag;
287:             })
288:             .forEach(tag -> {
289:                 JobPostingTag tagEntity = new JobPostingTag();
290:                 tagEntity.setJobPosting(jobPosting);
291:                 tagEntity.setTagName(tag);
292:                 jobPosting.getTags().add(tagEntity);
293:             });
294:     }
295: 
296:     private void validateBaseRequest(JobPostingRequest request) {
297:         if (request.title() == null || request.title().trim().length() < 5 || request.title().trim().length() > 200) {
298:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "title: Title must be between 5 and 200 characters");
299:         }
300:         if (request.description() == null || request.description().trim().length() < 20 || request.description().trim().length() > 5000) {
301:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "description: Description must be between 20 and 5000 characters");
302:         }
303:         var jv = appProperties.getJobValidation();
304:         if (request.payType() == PayType.HOURLY) {
305:             validateRange("payAmount", request.payAmount(),
306:                 BigDecimal.valueOf(jv.getHourlyPay().getMin()),
307:                 BigDecimal.valueOf(jv.getHourlyPay().getMax()));
308:         } else {
309:             validateRange("payAmount", request.payAmount(),
310:                 BigDecimal.valueOf(jv.getFlatPay().getMin()),

312:         }

315:         validateBigDecimalRange("weeklyHours", request.weeklyHours(),
316:             BigDecimal.valueOf(jv.getWeeklyHours().getMin()),
317:             BigDecimal.valueOf(jv.getWeeklyHours().getMax()));
318:         if (!PhoneUtils.isValidUsPhone(request.contactPhone())) {

323:     private void validateExistingJob(JobPosting job) {

354:     private void validateDates(LocalDate start, LocalDate end, boolean requireEnd) {
355:         if (start == null) {
356:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "validityStart: Start date is required");
357:         }
358:         if (end == null) {

361:             }

372:             throw new BusinessException(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST, "validityEnd: End date cannot exceed 90 days from start");

content.text:
- Documented the SQL safety contract atop `DashboardService.queryMetric` so future contributors understand the whitelist requirement when extending analytics queries (`backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/DashboardService.java`).
- Renamed the job validity config field from `min` to `default-days`, added a dedicated `ValidityDays` class in `AppProperties`, and updated both the service logic and tests to use `.getDefaultDays()` so defaults explicitly match configuration (`backend/src/main/resources/application.yml`, `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/config/AppProperties.java`, `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/JobPostingService.java`, `backend/src/test/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/JobPostingServiceTest.java`).

Backend compile still requires Maven to be installed (`cd backend && mvn compile -q`).

# Fix: Schema Drift â€” tickets table missing resolution column

## Priority: HIGH â€” Potential Docker startup blocker

## Files to modify
- `init-db/01-schema.sql`

## Problem

The `tickets` table in `init-db/01-schema.sql` is missing the `resolution TEXT` column that exists in `backend/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql`. Docker uses `init-db/01-schema.sql` to initialize MySQL, and Spring Boot uses `hibernate.ddl-auto: validate`, so the app will fail to start because the JPA `Ticket` entity expects a `resolution` field.

## Instructions

Open `init-db/01-schema.sql`.

Find the `tickets` table definition (around line 143):

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tickets (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    reporter_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    subject VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
    priority ENUM('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH','CRITICAL') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
    assigned_to BIGINT,
```

Add `resolution TEXT,` between the `priority` line and the `assigned_to` line:

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tickets (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    reporter_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    subject VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
    priority ENUM('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH','CRITICAL') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
    resolution TEXT,
    assigned_to BIGINT,
```

## Verification

Compare the two schema files:
```bash
diff init-db/01-schema.sql backend/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql
```
The tickets table definitions should now match.

-- ShiftWorks JobOps â€” Full Database Schema
-- Place this file at: init-db/01-schema.sql AND backend/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    role ENUM('EMPLOYER','REVIEWER','ADMIN') NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('ACTIVE','LOCKED','DISABLED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
    failed_login_attempts INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    locked_until TIMESTAMP NULL,
    captcha_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    password_changed_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_users_role (role)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_sessions (
    id VARCHAR(128) PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    last_active_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    absolute_expiry TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    is_valid BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    csrf_token VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    ip_address VARCHAR(45),
    user_agent VARCHAR(512),
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    INDEX idx_sessions_user (user_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description VARCHAR(500),
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS locations (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    state VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    city VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY uk_state_city (state, city),
    INDEX idx_locations_state (state)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_postings (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    employer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    category_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    pay_type ENUM('HOURLY','FLAT') NOT NULL,
    pay_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    settlement_type ENUM('WEEKLY','END_OF_SHIFT') NOT NULL,
    headcount INT NOT NULL,
    weekly_hours DECIMAL(4,1) NOT NULL,
    contact_phone VARCHAR(500),
    status ENUM('DRAFT','PENDING_REVIEW','APPROVED','PUBLISHED','REJECTED','UNPUBLISHED','TAKEN_DOWN','APPEAL_PENDING') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    validity_start DATE,
    validity_end DATE,
    reviewer_notes TEXT,
    takedown_reason TEXT,
    published_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (employer_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations(id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_employer (employer_id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_tags (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    tag_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_history (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    previous_status VARCHAR(30),
    new_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    changed_by BIGINT NOT NULL,
    change_reason TEXT,
    snapshot_json JSON,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (changed_by) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_actions (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    reviewer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    action ENUM('APPROVE','REJECT','TAKEDOWN') NOT NULL,
    rationale TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS appeals (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    employer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    appeal_reason TEXT NOT NULL,

-- ShiftWorks JobOps â€” Full Database Schema
-- Place this file at: init-db/01-schema.sql AND backend/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    role ENUM('EMPLOYER','REVIEWER','ADMIN') NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('ACTIVE','LOCKED','DISABLED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
    failed_login_attempts INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    locked_until TIMESTAMP NULL,
    captcha_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    password_changed_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_users_role (role)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_sessions (
    id VARCHAR(128) PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    last_active_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    absolute_expiry TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    is_valid BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    csrf_token VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    ip_address VARCHAR(45),
    user_agent VARCHAR(512),
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    INDEX idx_sessions_user (user_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description VARCHAR(500),
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS locations (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    state VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    city VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY uk_state_city (state, city),
    INDEX idx_locations_state (state)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_postings (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    employer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    category_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    pay_type ENUM('HOURLY','FLAT') NOT NULL,
    pay_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    settlement_type ENUM('WEEKLY','END_OF_SHIFT') NOT NULL,
    headcount INT NOT NULL,
    weekly_hours DECIMAL(4,1) NOT NULL,
    contact_phone VARCHAR(500),
    status ENUM('DRAFT','PENDING_REVIEW','APPROVED','PUBLISHED','REJECTED','UNPUBLISHED','TAKEN_DOWN','APPEAL_PENDING') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    validity_start DATE,
    validity_end DATE,
    reviewer_notes TEXT,
    takedown_reason TEXT,
    published_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (employer_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations(id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_employer (employer_id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_tags (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    tag_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_history (

    changed_by BIGINT NOT NULL,

    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),

);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_actions (

content.text:
- Hardened `AuditService.log` so it runs in its own `REQUIRES_NEW` transaction and rethrows failures instead of swallowing them; audit writes now fail closed with a clear critical log message if the entry canâ€™t be persisted (`backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/service/AuditService.java`).

Backend build still awaits Maven installation (`cd backend && mvn compile -q`).

# Fix: Frontend Tests Non-Functional + Missing from run_tests.sh

## Priority: HIGH â€” Zero meaningful frontend test coverage

## Files to modify
- `run_tests.sh`
- `frontend/src/__tests__/JobPostingForm.spec.js`

## Problem

1. `JobPostingForm.spec.js` reimplements the `payBounds` validation logic locally instead of importing it from the actual component â€” the test can pass even if production code is wrong.
2. `run_tests.sh` does not include `npm test` â€” frontend tests never run as part of the test suite.

## Step 1 â€” Add frontend tests to run_tests.sh

Open `run_tests.sh`.

Find the line after `cd ..` (around line 10). Add frontend test execution after the unit tests block.

Replace the entire file with:

```bash
#!/bin/bash
echo "======================================"
echo "  ShiftWorks JobOps â€” Test Runner"
echo "======================================"
echo ""

echo "=== Running Backend Unit Tests ==="
cd backend && mvn test -q 2>&1
UNIT=$?
cd ..
echo ""

if [ $UNIT -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "Backend tests: PASSED"
else
  echo "Backend tests: FAILED"
fi
echo ""

echo "=== Running Frontend Tests ==="
cd frontend && npm test 2>&1
FRONT=$?
cd ..
echo ""

if [ $FRONT -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "Frontend tests: PASSED"
else
  echo "Frontend tests: FAILED"
fi
echo ""

echo "=== Running API Functional Tests ==="
```

## Step 2 â€” Fix JobPostingForm.spec.js to test real component logic

Open `frontend/src/__tests__/JobPostingForm.spec.js`.

Replace the entire file with:

```javascript
import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';

vi.mock('@/stores/auth', () => ({
  useAuthStore: () => ({ role: 'EMPLOYER', user: { id: 1 } })
}));
vi.mock('vue-router', () => ({
  useRouter: () => ({ push: vi.fn() }),
  useRoute: () => ({ params: {} })
}));
vi.mock('@/api/jobs', () => ({ default: { createJob: vi.fn(), getJob: vi.fn(), updateJob: vi.fn() } }));
vi.mock('@/api/admin', () => ({ getCategories: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ data: [] }), getLocations: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ data: [] }) }));

describe('JobPostingForm pay validation boundaries', () => {
  it('hourly pay bounds are $12â€“$75', async () => {
    const { mount } = await import('@vue/test-utils');
    const JobPostingForm = (await import('@/views/JobPostingForm.vue')).default;

    const wrapper = mount(JobPostingForm, {
      props: { mode: 'create' },
      global: { stubs: { 'el-form': true, 'el-form-item': true, 'el-input': true, 'el-input-number': true, 'el-select': true, 'el-option': true, 'el-button': true, 'el-date-picker': true, 'el-alert': true } }
    });

    const vm = wrapper.vm;
    if (vm.payBounds) {
      expect(vm.payBounds.min).toBe(12);
      expect(vm.payBounds.max).toBe(75);
    }
  });
});
```

Note: If the component has additional dependencies that cause import failures, you may need to add more mocks. The key improvement is importing the actual component instead of reimplementing logic.

## Verification

```bash
cd frontend && npm test
```

If component mounting fails due to missing mocks, fall back to the simpler validation tests but add a comment explaining the testing limitation.

<content>1: <script setup>
2: import { computed, onMounted, reactive, ref, watch } from 'vue';
3: import { useRouter } from 'vue-router';
4: import dayjs from 'dayjs';
5: import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';
6: import jobsApi from '@/api/jobs';
7: import { useDictionaryStore } from '@/stores/dictionaries';
8: 
9: const props = defineProps({
10:   mode: { type: String, default: 'create' },
11:   jobId: { type: String, default: null }
12: });
13: 
14: const router = useRouter();
15: const dictionaryStore = useDictionaryStore();
16: const formRef = ref();
17: const cities = ref([]);
18: const loading = ref(false);
19: const newTag = ref('');
20: 
21: const form = reactive({
22:   title: '',
23:   description: '',
24:   categoryId: null,
25:   state: '',
26:   locationId: null,
27:   payType: 'HOURLY',
28:   settlementType: 'WEEKLY',
29:   payAmount: 20,
30:   headcount: 1,
31:   weeklyHours: 20,
32:   contactPhone: '',
33:   tags: [],
34:   validityStart: dayjs().format('YYYY-MM-DD'),
35:   validityEnd: dayjs().add(30, 'day').format('YYYY-MM-DD')
36: });
37: 
38: const isEdit = computed(() => props.mode === 'edit');
39: const categories = computed(() => dictionaryStore.categories);
40: const formTitle = computed(() => (isEdit.value ? 'Edit Job Posting' : 'Create Job Posting'));
41: const payBounds = computed(() => {
42:   if (form.payType === 'HOURLY') return { min: 12, max: 75, label: 'Hourly pay must be $12â€“$75' };
43:   return { min: 12, max: 5000, label: 'Flat pay must be $12â€“$5,000' };
44: });
45: 
46: const rules = {
47:   title: [
48:     { required: true, message: 'Title is required', trigger: 'change' },
49:     { min: 5, max: 200, message: 'Title must be between 5 and 200 characters', trigger: 'change' }
50:   ],
51:   description: [
52:     { required: true, message: 'Description is required', trigger: 'change' },
53:     { min: 20, max: 5000, message: 'Description must be between 20 and 5000 characters', trigger: 'change' }
54:   ],
55:   categoryId: [{ required: true, message: 'Category is required', trigger: 'change' }],
56:   state: [{ required: true, message: 'State is required', trigger: 'change' }],
57:   locationId: [{ required: true, message: 'City is required', trigger: 'change' }],
58:   payAmount: [
59:     { required: true, message: 'Pay amount is required', trigger: 'change' },
60:     {
61:       validator: (rule, value, callback) => {
62:         if (value < payBounds.value.min || value > payBounds.value.max) {
63:           callback(new Error(payBounds.value.label));
64:         } else {
65:           callback();
66:         }
67:       },
68:       trigger: 'change'
69:     }
70:   ],
71:   headcount: [{ required: true, message: 'Headcount required', trigger: 'change' }],
72:   weeklyHours: [{ required: true, message: 'Weekly hours required', trigger: 'change' }],
73:   validityStart: [{ required: true, message: 'Start date required', trigger: 'change' }],
74:   validityEnd: [{ required: true, message: 'End date required', trigger: 'change' }]
75: };
76: 
77: const disableEndDate = (time) => {
78:   const start = dayjs(form.validityStart || dayjs().format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
79:   const max = start.add(90, 'day').endOf('day');
80:   const min = start.startOf('day');
81:   return time.getTime() < min.valueOf() || time.getTime() > max.valueOf() || time.getTime() < dayjs().startOf('day').valueOf();
82: };
83: 
84: const disableStartDate = (time) => time.getTime() < dayjs().startOf('day').valueOf();
85: 
86: const loadCities = async (state) => {
87:   if (!state) {
88:     cities.value = [];
89:     form.locationId = null;
90:     return;
91:   }
92:   cities.value = await dictionaryStore.loadCities(state);
93:   if (!cities.value.some((city) => city.id === form.locationId)) {
94:     form.locationId = null;
95:   }
96: };
97: 
98: watch(() => form.state, (state) => {
99:   loadCities(state);
100: });
101: watch(() => form.payType, () => {
102:   if (formRef.value) formRef.value.validateField('payAmount');
103: });
104: 
105: watch(() => form.validityStart, (value) => {
106:   if (!value) return;
107:   const max = dayjs(value).add(90, 'day');
108:   if (dayjs(form.validityEnd).isAfter(max)) {
109:     form.validityEnd = max.format('YYYY-MM-DD');
110:   }
111: });
112: 
113: const addTag = () => {
114:   const tag = newTag.value.trim();
115:   if (!tag) return;
116:   if (form.tags.length >= 10) {
117:     ElMessage.warning('Maximum of 10 tags allowed');
118:     return;
119:   }
120:   if (!form.tags.includes(tag)) {
121:     form.tags.push(tag);
122:   }
123:   newTag.value = '';
124: };
125: 
126: const removeTag = (tag) => {
127:   form.tags = form.tags.filter((t) => t !== tag);
128: };
129: 
130: const buildPayload = () => ({
131:   title: form.title,
132:   description: form.description,
133:   categoryId: form.categoryId,
134:   locationId: form.locationId,
135:   payType: form.payType,
136:   settlementType: form.settlementType,
137:   payAmount: Number(form.payAmount),
138:   headcount: Number(form.headcount),
139:   weeklyHours: Number(form.weeklyHours),
140:   contactPhone: form.contactPhone,
141:   tags: form.tags,
142:   validityStart: form.validityStart,
143:   validityEnd: form.validityEnd
144: });
145: 
146: const persistDraft = async () => {
147:   await formRef.value.validate();
148:   const payload = buildPayload();
149:   loading.value = true;
150:   try {
151:     if (isEdit.value && props.jobId) {
152:       await jobsApi.updateJob(props.jobId, payload);
153:       ElMessage.success('Draft saved');
154:       return props.jobId;
155:     }
156:     const { data } = await jobsApi.createJob(payload);
157:     ElMessage.success('Draft created');
158:     await router.replace(`/employer/postings/${data.id}/edit`);
159:     return data.id;
160:   } finally {
161:     loading.value = false;
162:   }
163: };
164: 
165: const handleSave = async () => {
166:   await persistDraft();
167: };
168: 
169: const handlePreview = async () => {
170:   const id = await persistDraft();
171:   router.push(`/employer/postings/${id}/preview`);
172: };
173: 
174: const handleSubmit = async () => {
175:   const id = await persistDraft();
176:   try {
177:     await ElMessageBox.confirm('This will send the posting for reviewer approval. Continue?', 'Submit for Review', {
178:       confirmButtonText: 'Submit',
179:       cancelButtonText: 'Cancel'
180:     });
181:   } catch {

183:   }
184:   await jobsApi.submitJob(id);
185:   ElMessage.success('Submitted for review');
186:   router.push(`/employer/postings/${id}`);
187: };
188: 
189: const loadJob = async () => {
190:   if (!isEdit.value || !props.jobId) return;
191:   loading.value = true;
192:   try {
193:     const { data } = await jobsApi.getJob(props.jobId);
194:     form.title = data.title;
195:     form.description = data.description;
196:     form.categoryId = data.categoryId;
197:     form.state = data.locationState;
198:     await loadCities(form.state);
199:     form.locationId = data.locationId;

<script setup>
import { computed, onMounted, reactive, ref, watch } from 'vue';
import { useRouter } from 'vue-router';
import dayjs from 'dayjs';
import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus';
import jobsApi from '@/api/jobs';
import { useDictionaryStore } from '@/stores/dictionaries';

const props = defineProps({
  mode: { type: String, default: 'create' },
  jobId: { type: String, default: null }
});

const router = useRouter();
const dictionaryStore = useDictionaryStore();
const formRef = ref();
const cities = ref([]);
const loading = ref(false);
const newTag = ref('');

content.text:
- Updated `run_tests.sh` so CI runs backend unit tests, frontend Vitest suites, and API scripts with a clear summary plus non-zero exit if any stage fails.
- Rebuilt `JobPostingForm.spec.js` to mount the real Vue component using Pinia and mocks for router/dictionary/jobs APIs, so the pay-boundary assertions cover production logic. All necessary Element Plus components are stubbed, and the dictionary store no longer triggers HTTP calls.
- Ensured `npm test` now executes the router guard and JobPostingForm specs successfully.

Tests:
- `npm test` (frontend)

# Fix: Rename JobLifecycleIntegrationTest to Reflect Actual Scope

## Priority: MEDIUM â€” Misleading test name creates false confidence

## Files to modify
- `backend/src/test/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/integration/JobLifecycleIntegrationTest.java`

## Problem

The test class is named `JobLifecycleIntegrationTest` but only contains 2 security-focused tests (401 for anonymous, 403 for wrong role). It does not test any part of the job lifecycle. The name creates false confidence that the lifecycle is integration-tested.

## Instructions

Rename the file from `JobLifecycleIntegrationTest.java` to `JobPostingSecurityTest.java`.

Update the class name inside the file:

Find:
```java
class JobLifecycleIntegrationTest {
```

Replace with:
```java
class JobPostingSecurityTest {
```

That's it â€” just rename the file and class to accurately describe what it tests.

## Verification

`cd backend && mvn compile -q` â€” confirm no compilation errors. The renamed test should still be discovered by Maven.

content.text:
- Added a dedicated employer claims/tickets view with claim/ticket tables, dialogs for submitting new entries, and data fetches reusing the existing admin API client (`frontend/src/views/EmployerClaimsView.vue`).
- Exposed the new view via `/employer/claims` route and added it to the employer sidebar menu so employers can reach it (`frontend/src/router/index.js`, `frontend/src/components/Sidebar.vue`).

Tests/build:
- `npm run build` (frontend) â€” passes.

# Fix: AES Encryption Scope Limited to Single Field

## Priority: MEDIUM â€” Only contactPhone encrypted; email is plaintext

## Files to modify
- `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/entity/User.java`

## Problem

The prompt says "sensitive fields (for example, contact phone numbers) are encrypted at rest with AES-256 at the column level." Currently only `JobPosting.contactPhone` has `@Convert(converter = EncryptedStringConverter.class)`. User email â€” which is personal data â€” is stored in plaintext.

## Instructions

Open `backend/src/main/java/com/shiftworks/jobops/entity/User.java`.

Add the import for the converter at the top:

```java
import com.shiftworks.jobops.converter.EncryptedStringConverter;
import jakarta.persistence.Convert;
```

Find the email field:

```java
    @Column(nullable = false, unique = true, length = 100)
    private String email;
```

Add `@Convert` and increase the column length (encrypted values are longer):

```java
    @Convert(converter = EncryptedStringConverter.class)
    @Column(nullable = false, unique = true, length = 500)
    private String email;
```

Also update both schema files to match â€” change `email` column from `VARCHAR(100)` to `VARCHAR(500)` in the `users` table in:
- `init-db/01-schema.sql`
- `backend/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql`

## Verification

`cd backend && mvn compile -q` â€” confirm compilation.

files.before:
-- ShiftWorks JobOps â€” Full Database Schema
-- Place this file at: init-db/01-schema.sql AND backend/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    role ENUM('EMPLOYER','REVIEWER','ADMIN') NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('ACTIVE','LOCKED','DISABLED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
    failed_login_attempts INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    locked_until TIMESTAMP NULL,
    captcha_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    password_changed_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_users_role (role)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_sessions (
    id VARCHAR(128) PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    last_active_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    absolute_expiry TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    is_valid BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    csrf_token VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    ip_address VARCHAR(45),
    user_agent VARCHAR(512),
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    INDEX idx_sessions_user (user_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description VARCHAR(500),
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS locations (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    state VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    city VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY uk_state_city (state, city),
    INDEX idx_locations_state (state)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_postings (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    employer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    category_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    pay_type ENUM('HOURLY','FLAT') NOT NULL,
    pay_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    settlement_type ENUM('WEEKLY','END_OF_SHIFT') NOT NULL,
    headcount INT NOT NULL,
    weekly_hours DECIMAL(4,1) NOT NULL,
    contact_phone VARCHAR(500),
    status ENUM('DRAFT','PENDING_REVIEW','APPROVED','PUBLISHED','REJECTED','UNPUBLISHED','TAKEN_DOWN','APPEAL_PENDING') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    validity_start DATE,
    validity_end DATE,
    reviewer_notes TEXT,
    takedown_reason TEXT,
    published_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (employer_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations(id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_employer (employer_id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_tags (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    tag_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_history (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    previous_status VARCHAR(30),
    new_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    changed_by BIGINT NOT NULL,
    change_reason TEXT,
    snapshot_json JSON,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (changed_by) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_actions (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    reviewer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    action ENUM('APPROVE','REJECT','TAKEDOWN') NOT NULL,
    rationale TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS appeals (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    employer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    appeal_reason TEXT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('PENDING','GRANTED','DENIED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
    reviewer_id BIGINT,
    reviewer_rationale TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (employer_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS claims (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    claimant_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
    description TEXT,
    resolution TEXT,
    assigned_to BIGINT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (claimant_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (assigned_to) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tickets (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    reporter_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    subject VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
    priority ENUM('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH','CRITICAL') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
    resolution TEXT,
    assigned_to BIGINT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (reporter_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (assigned_to) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS file_attachments (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    entity_type ENUM('CLAIM','APPEAL','TICKET') NOT NULL,
    entity_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    original_filename VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    stored_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    file_type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    file_size BIGINT NOT NULL,
    checksum VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('ACTIVE','QUARANTINED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
    uploaded_by BIGINT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (uploaded_by) REFERENCES users(id),
    INDEX idx_files_entity (entity_type, entity_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_logs (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT,
    action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    entity_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    entity_id BIGINT,
    before_value JSON,
    after_value JSON,
    ip_address VARCHAR(45),
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    INDEX idx_audit_entity (entity_type, entity_id),
    INDEX idx_audit_time (created_at)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dashboard_configs (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    metrics_json JSON NOT NULL,
    dimensions_json JSON,
    filters_json JSON,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scheduled_reports (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    dashboard_config_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    cron_expression VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    last_run_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    next_run_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (dashboard_config_id) REFERENCES dashboard_configs(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS report_exports (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    dashboard_config_id BIGINT,
    file_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    file_size BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
    is_masked BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS alerts (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    alert_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    metric_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    message TEXT NOT NULL,
    severity ENUM('INFO','WARNING','CRITICAL') NOT NULL,
    is_read BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    acknowledged_by BIGINT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (acknowledged_by) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS backup_records (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    filename VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    file_path VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    file_size BIGINT NOT NULL,
    checksum VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
    encrypted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('COMPLETED','FAILED','EXPIRED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'COMPLETED'
);

-- ShiftWorks JobOps â€” Full Database Schema
-- Place this file at: init-db/01-schema.sql AND backend/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    email VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    role ENUM('EMPLOYER','REVIEWER','ADMIN') NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('ACTIVE','LOCKED','DISABLED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
    failed_login_attempts INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    locked_until TIMESTAMP NULL,
    captcha_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    password_changed_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_users_role (role)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_sessions (
    id VARCHAR(128) PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    last_active_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    absolute_expiry TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    is_valid BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    csrf_token VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    ip_address VARCHAR(45),
    user_agent VARCHAR(512),
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    INDEX idx_sessions_user (user_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description VARCHAR(500),
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS locations (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    state VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    city VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY uk_state_city (state, city),
    INDEX idx_locations_state (state)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_postings (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    employer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    category_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    pay_type ENUM('HOURLY','FLAT') NOT NULL,
    pay_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    settlement_type ENUM('WEEKLY','END_OF_SHIFT') NOT NULL,
    headcount INT NOT NULL,
    weekly_hours DECIMAL(4,1) NOT NULL,
    contact_phone VARCHAR(500),
    status ENUM('DRAFT','PENDING_REVIEW','APPROVED','PUBLISHED','REJECTED','UNPUBLISHED','TAKEN_DOWN','APPEAL_PENDING') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    validity_start DATE,
    validity_end DATE,
    reviewer_notes TEXT,
    takedown_reason TEXT,
    published_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (employer_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations(id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_employer (employer_id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_tags (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    tag_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_history (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    previous_status VARCHAR(30),
    new_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    changed_by BIGINT NOT NULL,
    change_reason TEXT,
    snapshot_json JSON,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (changed_by) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_actions (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    reviewer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    action ENUM('APPROVE','REJECT','TAKEDOWN') NOT NULL,
    rationale TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS appeals (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    employer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    appeal_reason TEXT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('PENDING','GRANTED','DENIED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
    reviewer_id BIGINT,
    reviewer_rationale TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (employer_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS claims (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    claimant_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
    description TEXT,
    resolution TEXT,
    assigned_to BIGINT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

-- ShiftWorks JobOps â€” Full Database Schema
-- Place this file at: init-db/01-schema.sql AND backend/src/main/resources/db/schema.sql

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    role ENUM('EMPLOYER','REVIEWER','ADMIN') NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('ACTIVE','LOCKED','DISABLED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
    failed_login_attempts INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    locked_until TIMESTAMP NULL,
    captcha_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    password_changed_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_users_role (role)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_sessions (
    id VARCHAR(128) PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    last_active_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    absolute_expiry TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    is_valid BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    csrf_token VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    ip_address VARCHAR(45),
    user_agent VARCHAR(512),
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    INDEX idx_sessions_user (user_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS categories (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    description VARCHAR(500),
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS locations (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    state VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    city VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY uk_state_city (state, city),
    INDEX idx_locations_state (state)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_postings (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    employer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    category_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    pay_type ENUM('HOURLY','FLAT') NOT NULL,
    pay_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    settlement_type ENUM('WEEKLY','END_OF_SHIFT') NOT NULL,
    headcount INT NOT NULL,
    weekly_hours DECIMAL(4,1) NOT NULL,
    contact_phone VARCHAR(500),
    status ENUM('DRAFT','PENDING_REVIEW','APPROVED','PUBLISHED','REJECTED','UNPUBLISHED','TAKEN_DOWN','APPEAL_PENDING') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    validity_start DATE,
    validity_end DATE,
    reviewer_notes TEXT,
    takedown_reason TEXT,
    published_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (employer_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (location_id) REFERENCES locations(id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_employer (employer_id),
    INDEX idx_jobs_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_tags (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    tag_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_posting_history (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    previous_status VARCHAR(30),
    new_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    changed_by BIGINT NOT NULL,
    change_reason TEXT,
    snapshot_json JSON,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (changed_by) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_actions (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    reviewer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    action ENUM('APPROVE','REJECT','TAKEDOWN') NOT NULL,
    rationale TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS appeals (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    employer_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    appeal_reason TEXT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('PENDING','GRANTED','DENIED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
    reviewer_id BIGINT,
    reviewer_rationale TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (employer_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (reviewer_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS claims (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    job_posting_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    claimant_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
    description TEXT,
    resolution TEXT,
    assigned_to BIGINT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (job_posting_id) REFERENCES job_postings(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (claimant_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (assigned_to) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tickets (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    reporter_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    subject VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    status ENUM('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN',
    priority ENUM('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH','CRITICAL') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
    resolution TEXT,
    assigned_to BIGINT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (reporter_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (assigned_to) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS file_attachments (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

    uploaded_by BIGINT NOT NULL,

    INDEX idx_files_entity (entity_type, entity_id)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_logs (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT,
    action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    entity_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,

    created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
    INDEX idx_audit_entity (entity_type, entity_id),
    INDEX idx_audit_time (created_at)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dashboard_configs (
    id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    metrics_json JSON NOT NULL,
    dimensions_json JSON,

-- ShiftWorks JobOps â€” Full Database Schema
